options.title: Overlayer Settings

options.selectionButtonHint: Show a small highlight button next to selected text

options.notesEdgeButtonHint: Round button that opens quick notes on any page

options.importHint: Restore notes and settings from a JSON backup
options.importError: Could not import the file: invalid format
options.clearAllText: All notes and settings will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
options.offlineNote: All data is stored locally on your device
